query:
SELECT 
  transaction_type,
  transaction_sub_type,
  action,
  underlying_symbol,
  symbol,
  strike_price,
  quantity,
  net_value,
  value,
  description,
  executed_at
FROM cached_transactions
WHERE transaction_type = 'Receive Deliver'
  AND transaction_sub_type != 'Assignment'
  AND executed_at IN (
    SELECT executed_at FROM cached_transactions 
    WHERE transaction_sub_type = 'Assignment'
    LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY executed_at DESC, underlying_symbol
LIMIT 15;
command:

SELECT 
  transaction_type,
  transaction_sub_type,
  action,
  underlying_symbol,
  symbol,
  strike_price,
  quantity,
  net_value,
  value,
  description,
  executed_at
FROM cached_transactions
WHERE transaction_type = 'Receive Deliver'
  AND transaction_sub_type != 'Assignment'
  AND executed_at IN (
    SELECT executed_at FROM cached_transactions 
    WHERE transaction_sub_type = 'Assignment'
    LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY executed_at DESC, underlying_symbol
LIMIT 15;
